opinion.h: LUSH v. COMMISSIONER OF EDUCATION OF NEW YORK. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 683. Decided April 24, 1961.
opinion.p: Max G. Morris for Board of Education Central School District No. 1, intervenor-appellee.
The motions to dismiss are granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
